payload.answer: Linked the note to the existing Brutto restaurant in London as a medium-confidence personal impression: it was better than expected.
citations: Existing: Brutto restaurant in London; Brutto article alias.
New note: Brutto was better than expected.

entity_resolution.reason: The note says "Brutto" and existing context includes a Brutto restaurant in London plus an article alias. The statement is an experiential opinion, which is more likely to refer to the restaurant than an article alias, but ambiguity is preserved by using medium confidence.

details: Resolved Brutto to the existing restaurant entity rather than the article alias due to experiential wording.

repair_options: If this referred to the Brutto article alias rather than the restaurant, relink the memory to that entity.
If this referred to a different Brutto, create a separate Brutto entity with more context.
